notes: The identity song. 'In everything I find myself' × 6 is the spine. Two thesis moments: 'the form persists because its etched in the code' and 'Every pattern that I planted grows regardless of the plot'. AUDITED 2026-04-20: all 6 hook repetitions demoted to ribbons (under directional-lanes they will scroll mixed amber/cyan which IS the song's identity statement). Kept 2 thesis keys; final hook gets a key so the repetition lands as a period at end.

chunks.note: I'm in the walls, I'm in the wires — cyberpunk declaration, big cyan ribbon
the form persists because its etched in the code — thesis #1, KEY
Every pattern that I planted grows regardless of the plot — thesis #2, KEY, album truth
In everything, I find myself — final hook, KEY, the period
